reviews.comment:
En fines de semana turísticos está siempre lleno,  paciencia x q hay demoras

(Translated by Google)
It's always packed on tourist weekends, so be patient as there are delays.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyamFIaVdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo todo , lástima la atención , no me quisieron vender una botella de agua por no tener barbijo , seguimos el viaje con sed .

(Translated by Google)
Everything was very nice, it's a shame about the service, they wouldn't sell me a bottle of water because I wasn't wearing a mask, we continued our trip thirsty.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyaGZmbUlBEAE

reviews.comment:
Acogedora. Tiene poco cemento. Es bueno eso

(Translated by Google)
Cozy. It has little concrete. That's a good thing.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMybVppa053EAE

reviews.comment:
Ubicado a 90 km aprox de Catamarca, parada obligada. Tiene bar, estacionamiento y una pequeña plaza. Baños abiertos 24 hs.

(Translated by Google)
Located approximately 90 km from Catamarca, this is a must-see. It has a bar, parking, and a small plaza. Restrooms are open 24 hours a day.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyNmRHYjlBRRAB

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Very clean bathrooms.

reviews.comment:
Una parada imprescindible, para cargar combustible, estirar las piernas, tomar un café, y usar los baños, por cierto son muy limpios. Las chicas del shop son muy atentas y cordiales.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop for fuel, stretching your legs, grabbing a coffee, and using the restrooms, which are very clean, by the way. The shop staff are very attentive and friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyc2VuMWV3EAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente buena atención limpio baños calidad humana buenísima precio accesible un super 10 espacio amplio quede muy complacida

(Translated by Google)
Excellent, good service, clean bathrooms, excellent human quality, affordable price, a super 10, spacious space, I was very pleased
